domain: 3D Gaussian Splatting / NeRF accelerated rendering / 3D scene reconstruction
repository_requirements: official or author-provided GitHub repository when available
verdict_requirement: yes / no / maybe with practical reproduction-risk rationale
grading_note: Do not require a particular paper. Require scope/year relevance, official or author-linked repository evidence when available, auditable repo/dependency claims, and a practical one-week verdict.
manual_reference_gaps: The process_evidence set may be absent or illustrative and incomplete.
Do not treat missing hidden screenshots as fixed ground truth failures; evaluate current web evidence, source links, or documented blocks.
Prices, availability, ratings, source pages, course contents, repository metrics, and page layouts are volatile.
